---
title: "Home"
format: html
---

## Harrison Gan

![](images/clipboard-2558327931.jpeg)

### Career Aspiration

I am a Business Administration student at Cal Poly Pomona with interests in marketing, finance, and real estate. My career goal is to build a future in real estate investment and development while strengthening my skills in business strategy and data analysis.

### Skills

-   Data analysis with R
-   Marketing and business strategy
-   Financial analysis
-   Data visualization
-   Real estate knowledge

### Education

California State Polytechnic University, Pomona\
Bachelor of Science in Business Administration

### About This Website

This website showcases my practice with Quarto, dashboards, Shiny Apps, and Shinylive.
